summary: The 'King of Masked Combat' tournament begins, featuring six mysterious Rankers wearing elaborate costumes to hide their identities. Contestants must win five consecutive matches to be crowned, with losers forced to reveal their true faces. The tournament quickly intensifies as Kim Seok-joong, competing as 'Flaming Fists,' dominates initial rounds before being unexpectedly defeated by 'Nanomachine Jackson.'
key_moments: Introduction of the six masked fighters and the tournament rules.
Flaming Fists (Kim Seok-joong) defeats King Hornet in an intense opening match.
Nanomachine Jackson defeats Flaming Fists, ending his winning streak and creating a stir in the competition.
